Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Roderick D. Hill
Off Calendar Aug-26-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Deputy Attorney RODERICK D. HILL of the California Department of Transportation (Tel: 510-433-9100) appearing for defendant State of California, Acting by and through the Department of Transportation/Caltrans;
Atty. ADRIENNE M. STOVER, ESQ. of Clinton & Clinton appearing via CourtCall for defendant Calvin Johnson.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT STATE OF CALIFORNIA, ACTING BY AND THROUGH THE DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION/CALTRANS' Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint.

Matter submitted without argument. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT STATE OF CALIFORNIA, ACTING BY AND THROUGH THE DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION/CALTRANS' Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint is granted No opposition filed.

Order signed in open court.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EPS)
